parameters.name: canonical.schema.text
parameters.value:
{
  "namespace": "com.celfocus.cap.avro.harmonizer.v1",
  "type": "record",
  "name": "AlarmAvro",
  "fields": [
    { "name": "ackState", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Current acknowledgement state of the alarm." },
    { "name": "ackSystemId", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Identifier of the system that acknowledged the alarm." },
    { "name": "ackTime", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Date and time when the alarm was acknowledged." },
    { "name": "ackUserId", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Identifier of the user who acknowledged the alarm." },
    { "name": "address", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Street address or detailed address of the location associated with the alarm." },
    { "name": "affectedClientNumber", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Number of clients or subscribers affected by the alarm." },
    { "name": "affectedService", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Reference(s) to services affected by the alarm." },
    { "name": "alarmAdditionalDetails", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Additional information not captured in other attributes, often a name-value set to extend the alarm payload." },
    { "name": "alarmChangedTime", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Date and time when the alarm was last changed or updated." },
    { "name": "alarmClearedTime", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Date and time when the alarm condition was cleared on the resource." },
    { "name": "alarmDetails", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Detailed description of the alarm, providing additional information about the condition and context." },
    { "name": "alarmDomain", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Domain or functional area of the alarm (for example, transmission, access, core, IT). Determined by cognitive automation platform (cap-harmonizer)." },
    { "name": "alarmedContext", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Context (for example, domain or scope) in which the alarmed object resides. (Previous Operation Context - ocName in TeMIP)" },
    { "name": "alarmedObject", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Reference to the object associated with the event that raised the alarm (for example, NE, interface, service component)." },
    { "name": "alarmedObjectDetails", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Additional information of the object associated with the event." },
    { "name": "alarmedObjectId", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Identifier of the object associated with the event that raised the alarm." },
    { "name": "alarmedObjectType", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Type or class of the object associated with the event (for example, ROUTER, INTERFACE, SERVICE)." },
    { "name": "alarmEscalation", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Indicates if this alarm has been escalated or not, and may hold related escalation data." },
    { "name": "alarmEventType", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Type of event that triggered the alarm lifecycle change (for example, alarmCreated, alarmChanged, alarmCleared)." },
    { "name": "alarmRaisedTime", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Date and time when the alarm was initially raised on the resource." },
    { "name": "alarmReportingTime", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Date and time when the alarm was reported into this alarm management system." },
    { "name": "alarmType", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Category of the alarm (for example, CommunicationAlarm, QualityOfServiceAlarm), representing the high-level type of the detected condition." },
    { "name": "cellName", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Name of the radio cell associated with the alarm." },
    { "name": "circuitDetails", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Details of the affected circuit, such as identifiers or characteristics relevant to the alarm." },
    { "name": "clearSystemId", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Identifier of the system that cleared the alarm." },
    { "name": "clearUserId", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Identifier of the user who cleared the alarm." },
    { "name": "closedEventTime", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Date and time when the alarm was closed in this alarm. Determined by cognitive automation platform (cap-harmonizer)." },
    { "name": "comment", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Free-form text comment associated to the alarm, usually added by operators or external systems." },
    { "name": "correlatedAlarm", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "References to alarms that are correlated to this alarm from a correlation or root cause perspective." },
    { "name": "county", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "County or administrative area where the alarmed resource is located." },
    { "name": "criticalSite", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Indicates whether the associated site is considered critical (for example, true/false). Determined by cognitive automation platform (cap-harmonizer)." },
    { "name": "crossedThresholdInformation", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Details of the threshold that has been crossed, including indicator, value, and threshold identifiers for threshold-crossing alarms." },
    { "name": "equipment", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Equipment associated with the alarm." },
    { "name": "equipmentId", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Identifier or name of the equipment instance associated with the alarm." },
    { "name": "equipmentType", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Type or category of the equipment associated with the alarm. Enriched from federated inventory data." },
    { "name": "eventTime", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Date and time when the alarm-event was created/updated." },
    { "name": "eventUid", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Unique identifier of the alarm-event. Determined by cognitive automation platform (cap-harmonizer)." },
    { "name": "externalAlarmId", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Identifier of the alarm in the source system, used to correlate with the external alarm record." },
    { "name": "fiEquipmentCode", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Code or identifier of the equipment associated with the alarm. Enriched from federated inventory data." },
    { "name": "fiEquipmentLatitude", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Latitude coordinate of the equipment site associated with the alarm. Enriched from federated inventory data." },
    { "name": "fiEquipmentLongitude", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Longitude coordinate of the equipment site associated with the alarm. Enriched from federated inventory data." },
    { "name": "fiEquipmentRegion", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Geographical region of the equipment associated with the alarm. Enriched from federated inventory data." },
    { "name": "fiEquipmentTechnology", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Technology of the equipment associated with the alarm (for example, 2G, 3G, LTE, 5G). Enriched from federated inventory data." },
    { "name": "fiSiteCity", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "City of the site associated with the alarm. Enriched from federated inventory data." },
    { "name": "fiSiteCode", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Code or identifier of the site associated with the alarm. Enriched from federated inventory data." },
    { "name": "id", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Identifier of the alarm." },
    { "name": "isAlarmInActiveState", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Indicates whether the alarm is still active (true) or no longer active (false). Determined by cognitive automation platform (cap-harmonizer)." },
    { "name": "isRootCause", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Indicates whether the alarm is a root cause alarm (true) or a symptom alarm (false)." },
    { "name": "lastModifiedUserId", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Identifier of the user who last modified the alarm (for example, by acknowledging or updating it)." },
    { "name": "latitude", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Equipment latitude." },
    { "name": "location", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Free-form location description or address fragment of the alarmed resource." },
    { "name": "locationCity", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "City where the alarmed resource is located." },
    { "name": "locationCountry", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Country where the alarmed resource is located." },
    { "name": "locationDistrict", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "District or sub-region associated with the location of the alarmed resource." },
    { "name": "locationId", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Identifier of the location associated with the alarmed resource." },
    { "name": "locationRegion", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Region associated with the location of the alarmed resource." },
    { "name": "locationType", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Type of location (for example, site, building, room) associated with the alarm." },
    { "name": "longitude", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Equipment longitude." },
    { "name": "nodeDeploymentStatus", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Operational deployment status of the network element or node associated with the alarm." },
    { "name": "nodeStatus", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Operational status of the network element or node associated with the alarm." },
    { "name": "observeCollectionId", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Identifier of the NIFI observe-collection event that produced this alarm." },
    { "name": "observeCollectionSource", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Observe collection source, e.g. the GCS file path/URL if we are processing files or the API used to fetch the alarms." },
    { "name": "observeCollectionTime", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Date and time when the alarm was observed/collected by NIFI (observe layer)." },
    { "name": "observeCollectionType", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Observe collection type: SNMP-TRAP, API, FILE." },
    { "name": "opco", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Operating company identifier associated with this alarm. Determined by cognitive automation platform (cap-nifi)." },
    { "name": "operator", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Name or identifier of the operator or organization handling the alarm." },
    { "name": "originalPerceivedSeverity", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Original severity of the alarm." },
    { "name": "parentAlarm", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Reference to the parent alarm when this alarm is a result of root cause analysis." },
    { "name": "perceivedSeverity", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Lists the possible severities that can be allocated to an alarm; values are consistent with ITU-T X.733 (for example, critical, major, minor, warning, cleared)." },
    { "name": "plannedActivityEndTime", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "End date and time of the planned activity related to this alarm or resource." },
    { "name": "plannedActivityId", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Identifier of the planned activity related to this alarm." },
    { "name": "plannedActivityStartTime", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Start date and time of the planned activity related to this alarm or resource." },
    { "name": "plannedOutageIndicator", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Indicates whether the alarm is associated with a planned outage or maintenance activity." },
    { "name": "priority", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Relative processing or handling priority of the alarm." },
    { "name": "probableCause", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Further qualifies the alarm in complement of the alarmType, indicating the probable reason for the alarm condition." },
    { "name": "problemOccurrences", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Number of times this problem or alarm condition has occurred." },
    { "name": "proposedRepairedActions", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Proposed repair or remedial actions to resolve the alarm condition." },
    { "name": "reportingSystemId", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Identifier of the system that reports the alarm into the management domain." },
    { "name": "serviceAffecting", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Indicates whether the alarm affects service or not." },
    { "name": "serviceProvider", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Identifier or name of the service provider that owns or manages the resource raising the alarm." },
    { "name": "sharedType", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Type or nature of the sharing arrangement (for example, passive sharing, active sharing)." },
    { "name": "sharingCompany", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Company with which the site or resource is shared." },
    { "name": "shortAt", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Short textual title or summary of the alarm, typically used as a concise description in user interfaces." },
    { "name": "siteGeograficalId", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "ID of the RAN site associated with the alarmed resource." },
    { "name": "siteName", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Name of the RAN site associated with the alarmed resource." },
    { "name": "siteResponsible", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Party or organization responsible for the site where the alarmed resource is located." },
    { "name": "siteSharing", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Indicates whether the site is shared with other parties and possibly which ones." },
    { "name": "sourceEventTime", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Date and time when the alarm-event was created/updated in the source system." },
    { "name": "sourceOriginalId", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Identifier of the source alarm in its original source system. Determined by cognitive automation platform (cap-harmonizer)." },
    { "name": "sourceSystemId", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Identifier of the system that originally detected or generated the alarm condition." },
    { "name": "specificProblem", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Specific problem that further qualifies the alarm in addition to the probableCause, typically a vendor-defined string." },
    { "name": "state", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Current lifecycle state of the alarm (for example, acknowledged, terminatedWithError, inProgress, done, cancel, canceled) as managed in the alarm system." },
    { "name": "technology", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Technology or network type associated with the alarm (for example, DSL, FTTx, LTE, 5G)." },
    { "name": "totalServiceAffected", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Indicates the total number or extent of services impacted by the alarm." },
    { "name": "troubleTicketId", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Identifier of the trouble ticket associated with this alarm." },
    { "name": "vendor", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Vendor or manufacturer of the equipment associated with the alarm." },
    { "name": "workOrderId", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Identifier of the work order associated with handling or resolving the alarm." },
    { "name": "xcoordinate", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Site X GPS coordinates." },
    { "name": "ycoordinate", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Site Y GPS coordinates." },
    { "name": "zcoordinate", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Site Z GPS coordinates." },
    { "name": "zipcode", "type": [ "null", "string" ], "default": null, "doc": "Postal code of the site or location associated with the location associated with the alarm." }
  ]
}
